$description: Machine-readable contracts for all slash commands. Used by inject-module-context.py to enrich AI session context and enable intelligent command routing.

triage.purpose: Full module triage: identity, classification, attack surface, recommendations; optional quick security scan

audit.purpose: Security audit a specific function: dossier, verification, call chain, risk assessment

lift-class.purpose: Batch-lift all methods of a C++ class with shared struct context

full-report.purpose: End-to-end multi-phase analysis: RE report, classification, attack surface, topology, specialized

compare-modules.purpose: Cross-module comparison: dependencies, API overlap, classification distributions

explain.purpose: Quick structured explanation of what a function does

search.purpose: Cross-dimensional search: function names, signatures, strings, APIs, classes, exports

reconstruct-types.purpose: Reconstruct C/C++ struct and class definitions from memory access patterns

cache-manage.purpose: View cache stats, clear, or refresh cached analysis results

runs.purpose: List, inspect, and reopen prior workspace runs and step summaries

health.purpose: Pre-flight workspace validation: extraction data, DBs, skills, config

taint.purpose: AI-driven taint analysis: trace attacker data from entry points to dangerous sinks with trust boundary analysis and skeptic verification

hunt-plan.purpose: Hypothesis-driven VR and strategic research planning: campaign planning, cross-module campaigns, post-analysis re-planning, tool/skill design, attack pattern matching, variant analysis, finding validation

hunt-execute.purpose: Execute a /hunt-plan research plan: run investigation commands, collect evidence, score confidence

batch-audit.purpose: Audit top N entry points or privilege-boundary handlers in parallel with consolidated security and exploitability report

xref.purpose: Quick cross-reference lookup: show callers and callees in a compact table

memory-scan.purpose: AI-driven scan for memory corruption: buffer overflows, integer overflows, use-after-free, type confusion

ai-logical-bug-scan.purpose: AI-driven scan for logic vulnerabilities (auth bypass, state confusion) with adversarial prompting and skeptic verification

callgraph.purpose: Build, query, and visualize call graphs: topology stats, SCCs, hubs, roots/leaves, path queries, diagrams

imports.purpose: Query PE import/export relationships: who exports, who imports, dependency graphs, forwarder chains

diff.purpose: Compare two versions of a module: function deltas, classification shifts, attack surface changes, code-level diffs

scan.purpose: Unified vulnerability scan: memory corruption + logic flaws + taint analysis with verification and exploitability scoring

prioritize.purpose: Cross-module finding prioritization: load cached scan/audit results, normalize, rank by exploitability x reachability x impact

rpc.purpose: RPC analysis: enumerate interfaces, map attack surface, security audit, trace handler chains, find clients, build topology, blast-radius, query stubs
rpc.parameters: <module> | surface [module] | audit <module> | trace <module> <func> | clients <uuid> | topology [module] | blast-radius <module|uuid> | stubs <uuid>

winrt.purpose: WinRT analysis: enumerate server classes, map privilege-boundary attack surface, audit security, classify entry points, find EoP targets
winrt.parameters: <module> | surface [module] | methods <module_or_class> | classify <module> | audit <module> | privesc [--top N]

com.purpose: COM analysis: enumerate servers by module or CLSID, map privilege-boundary attack surface, audit security (permissions, elevation, DCOM), classify entry points, find EoP and UAC bypass targets
com.parameters: <module_or_clsid> | surface [module] | methods <module_or_clsid> | classify <module> | audit <module_or_clsid> | privesc [--top N]

pipeline.purpose: Run, validate, or inspect headless batch analysis pipelines from YAML definitions
